content: Cleaned terminals.ts (dropped dead Session.events/eventSeq/tail/ZoneEvent/pushEvent + TAIL_MAX_BYTES; trimmed v4 historic comments; simplified setLifecycle), dispatch.ts (removed wireScheduler placeholder + unused dispatchContext field), activity.ts (fixed stale printf comment), state.ts (removed dead 'harness' role + 'resumed' TaskStatus + no-op parseValue). No behavior changes — protocolVersion=5, activity-log schema, pty.write submit, user-control lock all preserved. npm run build green. Report at ARCHITECT/outputs/Dispatch-Coordination.md.

Patched docs/orchestration.md against current code: added required ActivityEvent.from field + rejection set, scrubbed dead 'harness'/'resumed'/session.tail/tasks-json refs, corrected scheduler responsibility section (premature-final gate, assign rejection composers, supersede-on-reassign, all-done fold, orphan drop, blockedOn cycle, submitTurn dep name), added Plan mode + per-task state machine subsections. Deleted architect-plans/headless-transition.md, orch-mason-progress.md, and rmdir architect-plans/ (now gone). Flagged 3 CLAUDE.md drift items + 4 follow-ups for Electron-Platform in ARCHITECT/outputs/Dispatch-Coordination.md.

Audited architect-canvas.json (read-only). All 6 owned components present and inside zone bbox; component code matches except Runtime Adapters — overlay is in Dispatch Coordination but src/main/runtimes/ is Zone-Runtime-Fleet's code (attribution drift). All 9 edges match real data flow; dispatch-record→scheduler is unidirectional in canvas but bidirectional in code (Scheduler also writes back via setDispatchPendingTasks + appendDispatchConductorDecision). Comm-zone components are intentional mechanism duplicates; loop topology is accurate. Edits needed: none (audit-only). Findings appended to ARCHITECT/outputs/Dispatch-Coordination.md under '## Canvas audit (t-canvas-dispatch)'.
